chapter_title.en: The Thirty-Sixth Assembly, the Assembly of Tuesday, the Twenty-Sixth of Muharram, 368 AH.

text: 11 - وبهذا الاسناد، قال: قال رسول الله (صلى الله عليه وآله): من ساءته سيئته وسرته حسنته فهو مؤمن (2).

en.bilal-muhammad: By this isnad, he said: The Messenger of Allah (s) said: One who is distraught by his sin and joyed by his good deeds is a believer.
